title: Statistics catalog entry (GET /catalog)
description: One registered emission/statistic type from the semantic layer — the Observability catalog browse and the dashboard-assistant's grounding corpus. Source of truth: the console-api semantic layer (CONSOLE-CONTRACTS.md section 3.2): types self-register on first emission (name, observed dimensions/measures, types, cardinality) — no manual registry. Rows are filtered to the caller: `scopes` lists only the scopes the CALLER may see this type in, and types entirely outside the caller's grant do not arrive. Filters: `type` (prefix/glob), `scope`, plus the shared limit/cursor/since. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

first_seen.description: RFC 3339 UTC — when this type first self-registered (first emission observed).

last_emit.description: RFC 3339 UTC — most recent emission of this type; null when registered but never re-observed (e.g. after a catalog import).

scopes.description: Scopes this type has been observed in, FILTERED to the caller's readable scopes.

dimensions.description: Observed dimensions, keyed by dimension name.

type.description: Observed value type of the dimension.

cardinality.description: Observed distinct-value cardinality class; null while not yet classified.

measures.description: Observed measures, keyed by measure name.

kind.description: Measure semantics; null while not yet classified.

emit_rate_per_min.description: Recent emission rate (per minute, trailing window); null when too sparse to estimate.

joins.description: Relationship shapes observed from accepted emission links.
